mapper.select: select id, conversation_id, caller_id, receiver_id, started_at, ended_at, duration_sec, created_datetime from tbl_video_session where conversation_id = #{conversationId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into tbl_video_session (conversation_id, caller_id, receiver_id) values (#{conversationId}, #{callerId}, #{receiverId})
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_video_session SET ended_at = NOW(), duration_sec = EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - started_at))::int WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND (caller_id = #{memberId} OR receiver_id = #{memberId})
mapper.select: select s.id, s.conversation_id, s.caller_id, s.receiver_id, to_char(s.started_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as started_at, to_char(s.ended_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as ended_at, s.duration_sec, sm.summary, rm.member_handle as receiver_handle, rm.member_nickname as receiver_nickname from tbl_video_session s left join tbl_ai_video_summary sm on sm.video_session_id = s.id left join tbl_member rm on rm.id = s.receiver_id where s.caller_id = #{callerId} order by s.started_at desc nulls last, s.id desc
